topic.ja: でんわで　おやすみを　いう

ja.intro: でんわで　ともだちと　はなしています。もう　ねます。なんといいますか。
ja.question: ともだちに　なんといいますか。

tr.intro: Telefonla arkadaşınızla konuşuyorsunuz. Artık uyuyacaksınız. Ne söylersiniz?
tr.question: Arkadaşınıza ne söylersiniz?

en.intro: You are talking with your friend on the phone. You are about to go to sleep. What do you say?
en.question: What do you say to your friend?

de.intro: Sie telefonieren mit Ihrem Freund. Sie gehen jetzt schlafen. Was sagen Sie?
de.question: Was sagen Sie zu Ihrem Freund?

fr.intro: Vous parlez avec votre ami au téléphone. Vous allez vous coucher. Que dites-vous?
fr.question: Que dites-vous à votre ami?

es.intro: Estás hablando con tu amigo por teléfono. Ya te vas a dormir. ¿Qué dices?
es.question: ¿Qué le dices a tu amigo?

ko.intro: 전화로 친구와 이야기하고 있습니다. 이제 잘 것입니다. 뭐라고 말합니까?
ko.question: 친구에게 뭐라고 말합니까?

meanings.tr: iyi geceler (uyumaya giderken ya da geceye vedalaşırken söylenir)
meanings.en: good night (said when going to sleep or parting at night)
meanings.de: gute Nacht (gesagt beim Schlafen gehen oder beim abendlichen Abschied)
meanings.fr: bonne nuit (dit en allant dormir ou en se quittant le soir)
meanings.es: buenas noches (dicho al irse a dormir o despedirse de noche)
meanings.ko: 잘 자요 / 안녕히 주무세요 (잠자리에 들거나 밤에 헤어질 때 하는 말)

meanings.tr: hoş geldiniz / güle güle gitmediniz (eve dönen birine söylenir)
meanings.en: welcome back (said to someone who has returned home)
meanings.de: willkommen zurück (gesagt zu jemandem, der nach Hause zurückgekehrt ist)
meanings.fr: bon retour (dit à quelqu'un qui rentre chez lui)
meanings.es: bienvenido de vuelta (dicho a alguien que regresa a casa)
meanings.ko: 어서 오세요 (집에 돌아온 사람에게 하는 말)

meanings.tr: özür dilerim / üzgünüm (birini incittiğinde ya da hata yapıldığında söylenir)
meanings.en: I'm sorry (said when you have hurt someone or made a mistake)
meanings.de: es tut mir leid (gesagt wenn man jemanden verletzt oder einen Fehler gemacht hat)
meanings.fr: je suis désolé(e) (dit quand on a blessé quelqu'un ou fait une erreur)
meanings.es: lo siento (dicho cuando se lastima a alguien o se comete un error)
meanings.ko: 미안해요 (누군가를 다치게 하거나 실수했을 때 하는 말)

grammar.point: おやすみなさい (就寝の挨拶)

meanings.tr: Uyumaya gitmeden önce söylenen standart gece selamı. Telefonda da kullanılır.
meanings.en: Standard goodnight greeting said before sleeping, also used on the phone.
meanings.de: Standardmäßiger Gutenachtgruß vor dem Schlafen, auch am Telefon verwendet.
meanings.fr: Salutation de bonne nuit standard avant de dormir, aussi utilisée au téléphone.
meanings.es: Saludo estándar de buenas noches antes de dormir, también usado por teléfono.
meanings.ko: 잠자리에 들기 전에 하는 표준적인 인사말. 전화에서도 사용됩니다.

logic.tr: Ok karakteri uyumak üzere olan telefondaki kişidir. '2. おやすみなさい' (İyi geceler.) doğrudur — geceye vedalaşırken ve uyumaya giderken söylenen standart ifadedir. Seçenek 1 'おかえりなさい' eve dönen birine söylenir; telefonda uyumadan önce kullanılmaz (Bağlam Karışıklığı). Seçenek 3 'ごめんなさい' bir özür ifadesidir; uyumadan önce söylenmez (Bağlam Karışıklığı).
logic.en: The arrow character is the person on the phone who is about to sleep. '2. おやすみなさい' (Good night.) is correct — it is the standard farewell said when going to sleep. Option 1 'おかえりなさい' is said to someone returning home — not used before sleeping on the phone (Context Confusion). Option 3 'ごめんなさい' is an apology — not said when going to bed (Context Confusion).
logic.de: Der Pfeil-Charakter ist die Person am Telefon, die schlafen gehen will. '2. おやすみなさい' ist korrekt. Option 1 'おかえりなさい' sagt man zu jemandem, der nach Hause kommt (Kontextverwechslung). Option 3 'ごめんなさい' ist eine Entschuldigung (Kontextverwechslung).
logic.fr: Le personnage avec la flèche va se coucher pendant l'appel téléphonique. '2. おやすみなさい' est correct. L'option 1 'おかえりなさい' se dit à quelqu'un qui rentre (confusion de contexte). L'option 3 'ごめんなさい' est une excuse (confusion de contexte).
logic.es: '2. おやすみなさい' es correcto. La opción 1 'おかえりなさい' se dice a alguien que regresa (confusión de contexto). La opción 3 'ごめんなさい' es una disculpa (confusión de contexto).
logic.ko: 화살표 캐릭터는 전화 중에 자려는 사람입니다. '2. おやすみなさい'가 정답입니다. 선택지 1 'おかえりなさい'는 집에 돌아온 사람에게 하는 말입니다(상황 혼동). 선택지 3 'ごめんなさい'는 사과 표현입니다(상황 혼동).

image_prompt: Simple manga-style line drawing, black and white. A young woman with simple round head sits on a bed, holding a phone to her ear, eyes drooping sleepily, mouth open as if speaking. A thought bubble shows a friend's face on the other end of the call. The room has a pillow and blanket visible. Cartoon style with simple round faces, clean outlines, white background, no shading, no color, no text, no arrows. Same style as JLPT N5 textbook manga illustrations.
